title: PolicyDecisionsArtifact
description: The policy gate decisions for every node evaluated in a run. All property names are camelCase.

PolicyView.title: PolicyView
PolicyView.description: Policy gate outcome for a single node.

nodeId.description: Id of the node this decision applies to.

risk.description: Risk tier assigned by the gate (e.g. 'low', 'medium', 'high').

triggeredRules.description: Names of policy rules that fired.

requiresConfirmation.description: True when the node requires explicit user confirmation before execution.

trustSource.description: Trust tier inherited from the node.

sensitive.description: True when the node touches sensitive data or credentials.

externalSideEffect.description: True when the node has an observable external side effect.

destructive.description: True when the node performs a destructive or irreversible operation.

decisions.description: Policy decisions for every node, in evaluation order.
